treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Features of lesion : Fine scales, small, white or light brown. Sites : Usually involves extensor surfaces of extremities, sparing skin flexures / crease. Mild to moderate case : ► Emollient (Paraffin) or Glycerin + water mixture in 50:50 / Cream Emolent Plus (sq) / Softderm (gen) / XeroSoft Junior Plus (uni), Apply 3-4 times daily –––––––– 2 months / Continue ► Cream Urea 10% / Equra (sq) / Eucera (uni) / Aqua care (drg), Apply in affected part twice daily ––––– 2 months / Continue More severe cases : ► Cream Salicylic acid 6% / Kerasol (incp) / Salicid (sq), Apply in affected part one daily ––––– 2 months / Continue More severe cases : Add oral retinoid.

treatment.title: Features & Site
treatment.description: MELASMA (মেছতা) Melasma is an acquired light- or dark-brown hyperpigmentation (macular) with well-defined margins. Pigmentation darkens on sun exposure. Site : symmetrically on cheeks (most commonly), nose, forehead, chin or in the exposed areas. It may be associated with pregnancy, OCP, sun exposure, idiopathic etc. Causes : Mostly unknown. It is due to ↑ melanocytes. Birth control pills, 2 nd & 3 rd trimester pregnancy (commonly seen & called as mask of pregnancy), hormone therapy, stress, thyroid disease & sun exposure (UV light) are thought to be causes of melasma.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Treatment : 1. Photo/Sun-protection - Avoiding direct sun exposure. - Use of umbrellas. - Broad spectrum sun screen (SPF> 50). 2. Medical treatment : Use topical cream for 2 to 3 months. E.g., Hydroquinone 2 – 4 %, Azelaic acid 10 – 20 % etc. ► Cream Fluocinolone + Hydroquinone + Tretinoin / Trimela (incp) / Melatrin (zis) / Melano (sq) / Nospot (skf) / Triquin (uni), A pply at night –––––– 2 months ► Use Sunblock Preparation / Sun screen / SunMask (sq) / Depiwhite. M SPF 50+ Lotion (uni), B efore going to in sunlight, cooking, in morning and noon –––––– continue Advice : Sun protection, Heat protection, Light protection, Avoid Pills (OCP), treat thyroid & liver diseases (if any). [» Better to avoid Melatrin cream in hypersensitive skin & refer to a dermatologist. Failed treatment must be referred after 3 months. » Hydroquinone can also be used as first treatment of melasma. Hydroquinone is not effect in case of failed case with Melatrin (zis) / Melano (sq) / Nospot (skf). ¤ Hydroquinone 4 % / Spotclen (incp) / Depiquin (uni) / Noir (phar), Apply thin film of cream on affected area once / twice daily –––––– 2 months.]

treatment.title: Scar marks
treatment.description: Dark spot in face or Scar mark of injury or surgery ► Cream Fluocinolon 0.01%+Hydroquinone 4%+Tretinoin 0.05% / Cream Malasin (phar) / Melatrin (zis) / Melano (sq) / Nospot (skf), Apply BD over the affected part –––––– 2 to 6 months May use twice daily (BD) if scar area is covered beneath clothing but if in exposed area better to use once daily (OD) at night, as it is advised to avoid sunlight after use of that cream.

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: ➤ Vitiligo is localized depigmentation & it a long-term skin condition characterized by patches of the skin losing their pigment. It appears as milky white patches of skin (leukoderma) and can be cosmetically very disturbing. Most probably due to autoimmune mechanism due to focal loss of melanocyte. ➤ Generalized vitiligo may occur, usually symmetrical involving hand, wrist, knee, neck, around the eyes, mouth, dorsum of feet. The sites at friction or trauma are often affected. ➤ Family history may be present in one-third cases. Equally affects both sexes, familial in 30% of total cases. ➤ Features : Presence of depigmented macules (milky white) with scalloped border, Presence of leucotrichia, Predilection for sites of trauma, Koebner's phenomenon may be present (lesions appear at the site of skin damage).

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Calcineurin inhibitors : ► Ointment Tacrolimus 0.1% / Remus (sq) / Vitilimus (uni) / Tacrolim (incp) / Prolimus (hc) 0.1% oint. [ 0.03% if Apply in affected part once at night or twice daily ––– 2–6 months ± Multivitamin & Multiminarels can potentiates epithelialization. Especially vitamin B complex, zinc & vitamin A. ± ► Tab. Atoz Premium (rad) / Bextram Gold (bex) / Filwel Gold (sq) / Zovia Gold (ops) / Nutrum Gold (acm), 0 + 1 + 0 –––– 1 – 3 months ± Topical steroid & vit-D combination : ± ► Ointment Betamethasone + Calcipotriol (vitamin D) / Dyvon plus (sq) / Betol (acm) / Planex plus (incp) / Soria-D (zis), Apply once daily at night –– upto 8 weeks / 2 months ↓ If not improved, refer to a dermatologist for phototherapy. Advise : Reassurance and psychological support to the patient and family. Assure patient & his / her family members that it is not contagious disease & oppose the social stigma that it is a curse. Only 30% familial, so not all the offsprings will be affected. Use of sun screen regularly (if involves face or exposed & larger area). No food restriction.

treatment.title: Discussion
treatment.description: ➤ Initial potent topical corticosteroid for short duration can bring a good result, but avoid potent steroids on face, as it causes atrophy or thinning of skin. ► Cream Halobetasol Propionate 0.05% / Halobet (sq) / Ulticort (incp) / Halocort (aci) / Haloxa (ops), Apply in affected skin once at morning or twice daily––2–4 weeks ➤ Other treatment option : ► Methoxsalen 1% / Vitilen (zis) Lotion / Meladenin Paint, দিনে দুইবার ............ ৪ মাস নির্দেশনা - মিথোক্সালেন লোশন লাগানোর ২ ঘন্টা পর সাদাটে / শ্বেতী স্থানে সূর্যালোক লাগাবেন। ২ ঘন্টা পর ১০ মিনিট রোদ লাগাবেন। তারপর ক্ষতস্থানে পরিষ্কার পানি দিয়ে ধুয়ে ফেলবেন। স্বাভাবিকভাবে প্রথমে স্থানটি লালচে ও পরে কালচে হবে। ➤ Calcineurin inhibitors (Tacrolimus ointment) preferred for vitiligo affecting the eyelids, face, neck, armpits, and groin, because, unlike topical steroids, they do not cause skin atrophy. ➤ Investigation (if any suspicion about thyroid function & auto-antibodies) – CBC, S. TSH, FT3, FT4, IgE level.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: C/C : 1. Dark brown pigmentation around eyes, accentuated with physical fatigue. 2. Other factors include atopy, vascularity (Dark colour if dermal venule), shadow effect (Due to loss of periorbital fat and subsequent sunken eyes). No satisfactory treatment options available. Rx, ☼ Depiwhite eye contour gel (uni/ACM-France), Apply at night at affected part --- 3 months. Black eye / Dark circles : ☼ Sensibio Eye Contour Gel, Apply on dark area twice daily for 2 – 6 months. Rx of depression and sleep disturbance : If present. General measures : 1. Proper sleep, diet and stress management. 2. Photo-protective sunglass 3. Regular use of sunscreen.

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Acanthosis nigricans is a condition that causes areas of black or, brown pigmentation, thick velvety skin in body folds and creases. The affected skin might be itchy, odorous and develop skin tags. Sites of predilection : Axilla, neck, groin, umbilicus and other flexures. Cause : Insulin Resistance, Obesity, DM, PCOS, pre-cancerous lesion, certain drugs – high-dose niacin, birth control pills, prednisone and other corticosteroids.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Treatment : ► Cream Tretinoin 0.025% / Cosmotrin (bex) / Ratin-A (syn) Apply at night at affected part ------ 1 to 2 month ► Tab. Anti-oxidant / Betacarotene + Vit-C + Vit-E / Rex (sq) / EC+ (ori) / EC-Vit (zen), 0 + 0 + 1 -------- 1 month ± ► Ointment Calcipotriol (vitamin D) / Dyvon (sq)/ Dovonex (drg) / Planex (incp), Apply BD ------ 2 months ± ► Hyperkeratotic condition : Salicylic acid 6 % / 12 % / Cream Kerasol 6% / Salicid 12%, Apply twice or once at night --- 2 months Counselling : 1. No specific therapy. Poor response of treatment. 2. Weight reduction may help. 3. Control of DM (if uncontrolled). ¤ Salicylic acid has keratoplastic activity (correction of abnormal keratinization) & in higher concentrations, the drug has keratolytic activity (causes peeling of skin).

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: C/C : Usually sudden and abrupt onset, temporally related to drug intake. Treatment : ● Immediately withdrawal of the drug. ● Cream / Ointment Betamethasone 0.05% / Betameson (sq) / Betson (ops), Apply in affected part two times daily ––1 month ● Tab. Hydroxyzine 10 or 25 mg / Xyril (ops) / Artica (aci) / Roxyzen (incp) 25 mg, 1+1+1 or, 1+0+1 or, 0+0+1 –– 7 days If severe drug reaction, then add : ● Tab. Prednisolone 10 mg / Cortan (incp) / Deltasone (ren) / Pred (skf) / Precodil (ops) / Deltapred (zis) 10 mg, 1+0+0 (A/M) – 7 days ● Cap. Omeprazole 20 m g / Cosec (drg) / Inpro (bio) / Losectil (skf) / Omegut (pop) / Omenix (incp) / Omep (aris) / Ometac (nav) / Ometid (ops) / PPI (acm) 20mg, 1+0+1 ( ½ hr B/M) –––––– 7 days

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Dermatitis means inflammation of the skin. Eczema is a term used to describe a group of skin conditions in which the skin is itchy, dry, and inflamed. The terms eczema and dermatitis are often used interchangeably. But “dermatitis” is a broader term that encompasses more than eczema rashes. ECZEMA Eczema is defined as pruritic inflammatory disease of skin caused by various external and internal factors. It is characterized clinically by papules, vesicles and oozing in its acute stage, scaling and crusting in its subacute stage and lichenification in its chronic stage. Clinical features : ¤ Itching and vesicular eruptions on erythematous skin with erosion and exudation in acute cases or thickening. ¤ Accentuated skin markings. ¤ Fissuring with pigmentation & thickening of the skin (lichenification) in chronic cases. Classification of eczema : ENDOGENOUS EXOGENOUS COMBINED Seborrheic dermatitis Irritant dermatitis Atopic Dicoid / Nummular Allergic dermatitis Pompholyx Lichen simplex chronicus Photo-dermatitis Prurigo nodularis Radiation dermatitis Pityriasis alba Infective dermatitis Gravitional / Stasis Xerotic / Asteatotic Atopic dermatitis : Common in children, it can occur at any age. A common form of eczema which causes inflammation, dryness and itchy skin. Contact dermatitis : brought on by environmental triggers, re-exposure to same irritants. Neuro-dermatitis or, Lichen simplex chronicus : this form affects small patches of skin, they are itchy and scaly. Discoid eczema or nummular dermatitis : this form creates small, rounded coined shaped lesions all over the body, but especially on arms and legs. Dyshidrotic eczema : this type of eczema dries out the skin and can cause a burning sensation, rashes and blisters. Seborrheic dermatitis (SD) : Chronic papulosquamous disorder affects sebum rich skin, e.g., sebum-rich areas of the scalp, face and genitals, sometimes trunk. Secondary to toxic substances produced by commensal yeast Malassezia furfur. Dandruff like substance are must, sometimes erythroderma. Gravitational / Stasis dermatitis : a skin discoloration on the legs which looks similar to varicose veins.

treatment.title: Contact dermatitis (CD)
treatment.description: Contact dermatitis (CD) Type IV hypersensitivity. Two type – Irritant CD & Allergic CD. ¤ Reaction is specific to allergen or closely related chemicals such as j ewellery, bra clips, textiles, nickel, shoes, hair dye, cosmetics, fragrances, rubber gloves, local medication etc. ¤ Erythema, edema, papules, vesicle, bullae. ¤ Exudation, fissuring, scaling. Hand eczema is the most common occupational dermatitis (80%). Commonly faced person are- food service workers, hair dresser, automobile repairer, cement worker, metal or custodial worker, housemaids etc. Treatment : ● Cream / OintClobetasol propionate 0.05% / Dermasol (sq) / Topiclo (skf), Apply over the affected area BD –––– 14 days ● May need short term oral steroid. Advice : Removal of the particular allergic substance, Loose cotton clothing avoid wool (exacerbates eczema). Avoid excessive heat, keep nails short, clean bed. If a specific irritant is identified (e.g. house dust mite. pets) & avoid them.

treatment.title: Penile Eczema
treatment.description: ⊕ Penile eczema refers to eczema (may be Atopic / Seborrheic / Contact dermatitis) that affects the penis. ⊕ Atopic type of eczema can be particularly uncomfortable, causing discoloration, soreness, skin texture changes, and intense itching. ⊕ Seborrheic dermatitis presents with itchy well demarcated area & may produce dandruff like substances. ⊕ Contact dermatitis of penis may be due to using a latex condom. It may appear on the penis as raised, itchy bumps. Treatment : ● Cream Hydrocortisone Acetate / Topicort (sq) / Zocort (aci) / Cortider (skf), Apply twice daily –––– 7 – 21 days ● Instead of solo topical steroid anti-fungal + Hydrocortisone may use, if fungal infection or seborrheic dermatitis suspected. ● Tab. Hydroxyzine 25 mg or 10 mg / Artica (aci) / Xyril (ops) / Urtizin (uni) / Roxyzin (incp) 10 mg, 0 + 0 + 1 ––– 7 – 15 days

treatment.title: Insect Contact Dermatitis
treatment.description: Clinical features : ¤ Typical linear lesions commonly on exposed area – nape of the neck, face (peri-orbital & peri-oral), forearm & leg. ¤ Burning sensation and itching. ¤ Intact or ruptured vesicles (erosions) on an erythematous base. After 1-3 days will see the appearance of blisters, red, patchy skin, then blisters and tiny pustules appear. Lesions may look herpes zoster, but smaller & non-dermatomal distribution. ¤ Healing within 3 – 5 days without scaring. Treatment, ● Cream Diphenhydramine + Zinc Acetate / Togent (sq) / Bendil (alco) / ItchCare (incp) [can be used in neonates also], Apply to the affected area 3 to 4 times daily -------- 5 – 7 days

treatment.title: Photocontact Allergic Dermatitis
treatment.description: Dermatitis involving photo exposed sites sparing photo-protected sites e.g., upper eyelid and upper lip. Treatment : ¤ Mild to moderate topical steroid, it involves larger area. Cream / Ointment Clobetasone Butyrate 0.05 % / Ezex (sq) / Clobecort (ops), Apply in affected part BD ------ 15 – 30 days Advice : Avoid sun exposure specially between 9am to 3pm o'clock. Use sun protective cloths, hats, sheds during outing. Use broad spectrum sunscreen (SPF>50) before outing. If not responding : Refer to dermatologist. May need oral steroid, azathioprine etc.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Freckles are small flat spots that are usually found on sun-exposed areas of your body. They're tan, red, light brown or dark brown. Freckles are extremely common and aren't a health threat. They're more often seen in the summer. Advise : ● Protect from sunlight & avoid the sun between 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. ● Use sunscreen : Before going to in sunlight, cooking, in morning and noon. Fifteen to 30 minutes before going outdoors, apply a broad-spectrum sunscreen with a sun protection factor (SPF) of at least 30. Apply sunscreen generously, and reapply every two hours. ± ● Cream. Isotretinoin 0.025% / Cosmotrin (bex) / Retin-A (syn), Apply at night at affected part -------- 1 month ● Referral in nonresponsive cases, laser therapy is helpful.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.disease_name: Age spots / Liver spots / Solar lentigo
treatment.description: Solar lentigo commonly appears in sun-exposed parts of your body. It can be found on any part of your body and is most often caused by sun damage or exposure to radiation. Unlike freckles, which are common in children and fade with no sun exposure, age spots don't fade. Advise : ● Protect from sunlight & avoid the sun between 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. ● Use sunscreen : Before going to in sunlight, cooking, in morning and noon. Fifteen to 30 minutes before going outdoors, apply a broad-spectrum sunscreen with a sun protection factor (SPF) of at least 30. Apply sunscreen generously, and reapply every two hours. ± ● Cream. Isotretinoin 0.025% / Cosmotrin (bex) / Retin-A (syn), Apply at night at affected part -------- 1 month ● Referral in nonresponsive cases, laser therapy is helpful.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Well demarked dermatitis around the mouth. Symptoms are dryness, redness, scaling, and itchiness on or around the lips triggered by repeated irritation from saliva contact. Rx – ● Avoid lip-licking. ● Avoid corticosteroid. ● Ointment Tacrolimus 0.03% / Remus (sq) / Vitilimus (uni) / Tacrolim (incp) / Prolimus (hc) 0.03% oint, Apply on affected part OD at night --------- 1 month ● Cream Emollient / Emolent Plus (sq) / Softderm (gen) / Parasoft (aci) / XeroSoft Junior Plus (uni), Apply 3-4 times/day to moist skin ---------- 1 month

treatment.title: Lichen Simplex Chronicus (LSC)
treatment.disease_name: Lichen Simplex Chronicus (LSC), Lichen Planus (LP), Oral Lichen Planus
treatment.description: In LSC lichenification occurs due to repeated compulsive scratching or rubbing of the skin. LSC is a form of chronic eczema characterized by – ¤ Increased skin marking. ¤ Increased pigmentation. ¤ Increased thickening of the skin. Treatment : ● Ointment Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% + Salicylic Acid 3% / Topiclo S (skf) / Dermasol Plus (sq) / Closalic (zis) / Xenosal (uni), Apply a thin layer of this ointment to the affected skin areas twice daily and rub in gently & completely ------- 2 – 4 weeks ¤ Super potent topical steroids for 3-4 weeks followed by mid to low potent. ¤ Emollient – vaseline, liquid paraffin, coconut / olive oil, urea. ¤ If secondary infection – antibiotic should be given.

treatment.title: LICHEN PLANUS (LP)
treatment.disease_name: Lichen Simplex Chronicus (LSC), Lichen Planus (LP), Oral Lichen Planus
treatment.description: Lichen planus is a cell-mediated immune response of unknown origin, that can affect the skin, hair, nails and mucous membranes. Cutaneous lichen planus (CLP) most commonly involves the flexor surfaces of the extremities and Usual sites are lower leg, frontal of ankle joint, inner thigh, outer surface forearms, scalp, nape of the neck, scrotum etc. Lesion presents as small itchy violaceous Papules in middle-aged adults, female predominant. “Pruritic, Purple, Polygonal, Planar, Papules, and Plaques” are the traditional 6 “P's” of LP. Nail Lichen planus : Typically affects several or most nails, Pterygium unguis : Scarring between nail matrix and proximal nail fold, Nail plate thinning and longitudinal ridging, Other cutaneous features of lichen planus. The nail may also be darken, thicken or lift off the nail bed (onycholysis), or may shed or stop growing altogether, and rarely, completely disappear (anonychia).

treatment.title: Oral Lichen Planus
treatment.disease_name: Lichen Simplex Chronicus (LSC), Lichen Planus (LP), Oral Lichen Planus
treatment.description: Involved in 50% of patients with cutaneous Lichen Planus. Features of lesion : Oral mucosa shows reticulate lacey pattern, whitish or violaceous (violate or blackish) plaques & papules on buccal mucosa, tongue and gingiva. Treatment of Lichen Planus (LP) : Topical steroid : ► Oint Clobetasol Propionate 0.05%/ Exovate (bex)/ Dermasol (sq) / Clovate (aci) / Xenovate (uni) / Topiclo (skf) / Nyclobate (incp), Apply locally twice daily ––––– 4 weeks Antihistamine for intense pruritus : ► Tab. Cetirizine 10 mg / Acitrin (aci) / Alatrol (sq) / Atrizin (bex) / Citin (ops) / CTZ (del) / Riz (ori), 0 + 0 + 1 –––––––––– 7 – 30 days In case of extensive lichen planus : ► Cap. Omeprazole 20mg 1+0+1(B/M) –––– – 5 weeks ► Tab. Prednisolone 10 mg / Cortan (incp) / Deltasone (ren) 10 mg, 4+0+0 (A/M) –– – 1 week, then 3+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then 2+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then 1+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then ½ + 0 + 0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then Ø Principle of drug treatment : In local LP : Systemic antibiotic, antihistamine and topical steroid ointment. In extensive LP : Systemic antibiotic, antihistamine, topical steroid ointment & oral steroid with PPI. Ø When to refer to dermatologist : 1. Diagnosis is doubtful. No steroid should prescribe & refer. 2. Extensive involvement. 3. Resistant to topical treatment. 4. Potentially scarring nail dystrophy.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Prurigo nodularis (PN) is a chronic disorder of the skin that is classically seen as multiple, firm, flesh to pink colored nodules commonly located on the extensor surfaces of the extremities and torso (back & chest). Lesions are very itchy and symmetrical distribution. In Molluscum Contagiosum (MC) the umbilicated nodules are not itchy, not painful & not symmetrical. Treatment : ► Cap. Omeprazole 20 mg , 1 + 0 + 1 (B/M) ––– 5 weeks ► Tab. Prednisolone 10 mg / Cortan (incp) / Deltasone (ren) 10 mg 4+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then 3+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then 2+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then 1+0+0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then ½ + 0 + 0 (A/M) ––– 1 week, then ► T ab. Cetirizine 10 mg / Acitrin (aci) / Alatrol (sq) / Atrizin (bex) / Citin (ops) / CTZ (del) / Riz (ori), 0 + 0 + 1 ––––––––– 7 – 14 days ► If infected may add, Tab. Cefuroxime Axetil + Clavulanic Acid (500 mg+125 mg) / Axim CV (aris) / Cerox CV (aci) / Cefaclav (incp) / Cefotil Plus (sq) / Turboclav (bex), 1+0+1 –––––– 7 – 10 days

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Primary lesions circular or oval coin-shaped, erythematous, edematous, vesicular & crusted patches or plaques with clearly demarcated edge. Pruritus is usually severe and paroxysmal, compulsive quality, nocturnal timing. Site : Dorsa of the hands or extensor surfaces of the arms. Seen most frequently on the lower legs. Discoid eczema may resemble other annular skin eruptions including tinea corporis, plaque psoriasis, and pityriasis rosea. Management : • Simple soaking and greasing with an occlusive ointment. • Potent or super potent topical steroids (once or twice daily, ointment prefer to cream) • Sedative antihistamine, doxepin or gabapentin at bedtime. • Appropriate antibiotic coverage if secondary staphylococcal infection present. • Intralesional or systemic corticosteroid therapy may be required (if refractory to topical agents). • Phototherapy with NB UVB, bath or oral PUVA can be effective.

treatment.title: Signs & Features
treatment.description: Psoriasis (বিক্খাউজ) Psoriasis is a chronic autoimmune condition that causes the rapid proliferation of skin cells (multiply up to 10 times faster than normal). Normally, skin cells are replaced every 10 to 30 days. With psoriasis, new cells grow every 3 to 4 days. This extra cells causes bumpy red patches covered with silvery-white scales. Chronic plaque psoriasis is the commonest (90%) but, Guttate psoriasis is more common in children and young adults. ¤ Auspitz sign : when the scales are completely scraped off, multiple bleeding points are seen. ¤ Koebner phenomenon / isomorphism skin test : lesion produced at trauma / injury sites. ¤ Grattage (Scratch) test : scales can be removed in layers (similar to one scratching a wax candle). Aggravating Factors of Psoriasis : Trauma, Infections, Emotion and Anxiety. Drugs : Beta blockers, anti-malarial drugs, NSAIDs, ACEi, lithium, Terbinafine, Withdrawal of corticosteroids. Dermatologist Referral of any case of psoriasis is advocated, if non responsive & affecting social life, relapsed cases, affecting more surface area, cosmetically important & sensitive area, associated arthropathy, Generalized pustular or eythrodermic psoriasis.

treatment.title: Plaque Psoriasis
treatment.description: Plaque Psoriasis Features of lesion : Plaque psoriasis causes raised, inflamed, red skin covered with silvery, white scales. Circumscribed erythematous plaque with dry white / silvery scale. Usually non-itchy, but sometimes patches may itch and burn. Auspitz's sign and Koebner phenomenon is positive. Sites : Usually affects symmetrically in scalp, extensor surfaces of arm, forearm, elbow, knee, palm, sole. Psoriasis can't transmit from person to person. More than one family members may be affected due to genetic predisposition.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: ► Cream Halobetasol / Halobet (sq) / Ulticort (incp) / Halocort (aci) / Haloxa (ops), Apply locally twice daily ------ 2 months ► Ointment Calcipotriol (vitamin D) / Dyvon (sq)/ Dovonex (drg) / Planex (incp), Apply locally 1 – 2 times daily -------- 2 months ► Multivitamin & Multiminerals or, Tab. Vit-B complex & Zinc / Bicozin (sq) / Xinc B (skf) / Pep plus (ori) / Aritone Z (incp), 1 + 0 + 1 --------- 1 – 2 months ± ► Ointment Tacrolimus 0.1% / Remus (sq) / Vitilimus (uni) / Tacrolim (incp) / Prolimus (hc) 0.1% oint., Apply in affected part twice daily ------ 2 months [ Tacrolimus on face & genital lesions or lesion on large area (> 10% BSA), instead of potent steroids. Though psoriasis is rare in that area, 0.03% if ± ► Cap. Cholecalciferol [Vit-D 3 ] 20k IU / D-Rise (bex) / D-Cap (drg)/ D-Balance (sq)/ D-Vine (hc)/ D3 (aci)/ Defrol (acm) 20000IU, One capsule weekly (on friday) ------ 8 weeks ± ► Emollient – vaseline, liquid paraffin, coconut / olive oil, urea : Topical Cream Urea 10% / Equra (sq) / Aqua Care (drg) / Eucera (uni), Apply locally BD ------- 4 – 8 weeks ± ► Coal Tar 10% / Cream Soritar (uni) / Dermatar Soap (Coal tar + Salicylic Acid), Apply 2–3 times daily ------ 2 months ± ► If itching, Tab. Fexofenadine 120 mg / Axodin (bex) / Fenadin (ren) / Fexo (sq) / Fexofast (drg) / Telfast (syn), 0+0+1 ------ 14 days Maintenance therapy of Psoriasis - ► Cream Halobetasol / Halobet (sq) / Ulticort (incp), Twice weekly (Friday and Monday) for 6 month ► Oint Calcipotriol / Dyvon (sq) / Dovonex (drg), Once weekly (Wednesday) for 6 month If not control by topical agents, then systemic treatment needed, in that case better to refer to a dermatologist. Investigation should done before starting the drugs. Adv : CBC, S. Creatinine, S. Bilirubin, SGPT. ☼ Tab. Methotrexate 2.5 or, 10 mg / Methotrax (del) 2.5 or, 10 mg / Methox (pop) 2.5 or, 10 mg / MTX 2.5 mg (choo), 7.5 – 10 mg weekly on Friday night------ upto 6 months ☼ Tab. Folic Acid 5 mg / Folison (jay) / Folic Acid (ami), 2 tab weekly on Saturday night ------ upto 6 months উপদেশ - ১। সোরিয়াসিস নিরাময়যোগ্য নয়, পুনরায় আর্বিভাব ঘটতে পারে, তবে নিয়ন্ত্রণযোগ্য কিন্তু সময়সাপেক্ষ (কমপক্ষে ছয় মাস থেকে এক বছর)। তাই চিকি ৎ সা গ্রহণে ধৈর্য্যধারণ অত্যাবশ্যক। ২। (লিভার ফাংশন টেস্ট) SGPT রক্তের রিপোর্টসহ ৪ সপ্তাহ পরে দেখা করবেন। [ If needed CBC, S. Bilirubin, S. Creatinine etc.] ৩। যে সমস্ত কারণে রোগ বৃদ্ধি হয় (আঘাত, সংক্রামন, সূর্যালোক, ঠান্ডা আবহাওয়া, অ্যালকোহল, ধূমপান, স্থূলতা ইত্যাদি), চিকি ৎ সকের পরামর্শ ছাড়া ঔষধ সেবন থেকে বিরত থাকুন। Note – Methotrexate is a hepatotoxic drug, so follow up with liver function test is a must. Dose may need to increase upto 50mg/weekly. Folic / Folinic acid with methotrexate reduces the folate deficiency (stomatitis, abnormal liver functions, gastrointestinal intolerance, bone marrow toxicity).

treatment.title: Inverse / Flexural Psoriasis
treatment.description: Inverse / Flexural Psoriasis Inverse psoriasis (IP), also known as flexural or intertriginous psoriasis, is a variety of plaque psoriasis that involves the body folds, most often the axillary, anogenital, and inframammary ones. About 20% of plaque psoriasis patients develop inverse psoriasis. Treatment – Same as chronic plaque psoriasis (topical steroid).

treatment.title: Guttate Psoriasis
treatment.description: Guttate Psoriasis Guttate psoriasis often starts in children or young adults ( Lesions : Small, pink-red spots on larger skin area. Site : Mostly on trunk, also in upper arms, thigh, scalp.

treatment.title: Palmoplantar psoriasis / Psoriasis of palm and sole
treatment.description: Palmoplantar psoriasis / Psoriasis of palm and sole ● Usually associated with psoriasis of other sites and bilateral involvement. ● Symmetrical, well defined, erythematous, thick plaques. Silvery scales may be profuse or minimal. Scales usually adherent to palm and sole. Associated characteristically with hyperkeratotic, erythematous plaques on knuckles and with spillage proximally into wrists and ankle. Treatment : ► Ointment Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% + Salicylic Acid 3% / Topiclo S (skf) / Dermasol Plus (sq) / Closalic (zis) / Xenosal (uni), Apply a thin layer of this ointment to the affected skin areas twice daily and rub in gently & completely ----- 4 – 8 weeks ± ► Ointment Calcipotriol (vitamin D) / Dyvon (sq)/ Dovonex (drg) / Planex (incp), Apply locally 1 – 2 times daily ------ 4 – 8 weeks

treatment.title: Nail psoriasis
treatment.description: Nail psoriasis It is relatively rare condition. Nail changes include pitting , nail plate thickening , subungual hyperkeratosis onycholysis and brown discoloration of nail plate. The Pits are large, irregular present in several nails due to nail matrix psoriasis.

treatment.title: Scalp psoriasis
treatment.description: Raised, discolored plaques on your scalp or on the skin around your scalp that may be dry, itchy and irritating. Treatment : ► Soritar Scalp Ointment (Coal Tar + Precipitated Sulphur + Salicylic Acid), Apply daily (or each alternate day) in the affected area then wash after 1 hour with shampoo ------- 7 days ► Scalp Solution Clobetasol propionate 0.05 % / Nyclobate (incp) / Dermasol-S (sq) / Xenovate (uni) Scalp Solution, Apply over the scalp BD --------- 14 days

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Pyoderma means any skin disease that is pyogenic (having pus), caused by infection from normal skin flora, commonly by staphylococcus aureus. Staphyloccus aureus may be either methicilllin-sensitive (MSSA) or methicilllin-resistant (MRSA). Pyo-dermas may be dangerous for DM & immune suppressed patients. Primary pyodermas are : Folliculitis Clinical features of pyodermas : ¤ localized skin lesion. ¤ painful, tender, ¤ papule and pustule present. ¤ central suppuration present ¤ ± regional lymphadenopathy. ¤ ± systemic features / toxicity (fever).

treatment.title: Definitions
treatment.description: FOLLICULITIS : This is the most superficial type of inflammation of the hair follicles. Presents as pustules and erythema in hair-bearing areas, e.g. scalp, neck, breasts, buttocks, leg, back, chest, beard area and face. BOIL / FURUNCLE : This is an infection of the hair follicle that goes into the deeper layers of skin. A small pocket of pus (abscess) forms. They often occur in neck, breasts, face, armpits, buttocks, thighs, groin etc. CARBUNCLE : Cluster of boils / furuncles. A carbuncle is larger and deeper than a boil. Carbuncles are often found on the back of the neck or thigh. Swollen, painful area discharging pus from several points. May be associated with fever & malaise. If large but localized, painful, fluctuant : Incision and drainage. Hospitalization & Surgery : If not cured with primary care treatment. Boil is in a sensitive area, e.g., genital region, face, neck, axilla, breast. Young or uncooperative child.

treatment.title: Erysipelas
treatment.description: Erysipelas is a superficial infection of the skin surface involves upto dermis. But if it infects upto subcutaneous tissue then it is called cellulitis. Mostly due to group-A beta hemolytic streptococcus infection. Erysipelas most commonly involves face than limb. Whereas cellulitis commonly affects the lower limbs, but it can occur on the arms, orbit (face) or anywhere. Lesion features : ● Erythematous & painful skin lesion. ● Sharp palpable edge. In severe case vesicle, bullae, and skin necrosis may occur. Note that photo-dermatitis or viral rashes are not painful whereas erysipelas & cellulitis are locally painful. Systemic clinical features : High grade fever, Rigor, Fatigue, Headache, Vomiting etc. Initial investigation : CBC, RBS, Pus for C/S.

treatment.title: Cellulitis
treatment.description: Cellulitis is a common, potentially serious bacterial skin infection. ● Affected skin is hot, painful, erythematous and oedematous. ● Margin is ill defined. Not sharply defined as erysipelas. ● Constitutional symptoms may be present. ● Blistering often occurs and may be haemorrhagic. ● Regional lymphadenopathy is common. Refer to a specialist / Hospital : Should treat by a specialist (Surgery/Dermatology). Must advise hospitalization in case of extreme ages (old & children), immuno-compromised, DM patient or high chance of being gangrenous. Treatment of Pyoderma (Mild/Moderate case), Must refer the complicated or severe cases to specialists : Anti-biotic : Any of anti-staphylococcal antibiotics. ► Tab. Amoxicillin + Clavulanic Acid (875 mg+125 mg / 500 mg+125 mg) / Augment (skf) / Moxaclav (sq) / Tyclav (bex) / Avloclav (aci) / Fimoxyclav (syn) / Clacido (hc) / Zylopen (rad), ১ + ১ + ১ ---------------- ৫ থেকে ৩০ দিন + Analgesics : Paracetamol 500 mg (1+1+1 or, 2+2+2 ----- 5 days), or, in case of severe pain NSAIDs with PPI – ► Tab. Ketorolac 10 mg / Torax (sq) / Rolac (ren) / Toradolin (rad) / Xidolac (bex) / Zeropain (hc), ১ + ০ + ১ (ভরাপেটে) ------------- ৫ দিন ► Cap. Omeprazole 20 mg / Cosec (drg) / Inpro (bio) / Omep (aris) / Ometac (nav) / PPI (acm) / Prevas (gen) / Proceptin (bex) ১ + ০ + ১ (খাবার আধা ঘন্টা পূর্বে) ------------------------------ ৫ দিন ± Anxiolytic : Only if anxiety or stress present. ► Tab. Clonazepam 0.5 mg / Rivotril (rad) / Clonatril (hc) 0.5 mg, ০ + ০ + ১ ------------------------------ ৫ – ১০ দিন Advise : ° Don’t squeeze or try to drain a boil yourself by puncturing or scratching. ° Warm compression, daily 3 - 4 time till the pus drains out naturally. ° Must take long-term antibiotics for aged DM or immuno-compromised patient (as prescribed) & follow up at regular interval. ° Use anti-bacterial soap. [Lifebuoy, Dettol, Sepnil anti-bacterial soap]

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: SCALP FOLLICULITIS = Folliculitis Barbae + Scalp folliculitis Symptoms for scalp folliculitis may include : irritating-red follicles, pustule, damaged hair, excessive itching. Scalp folliculitis often associated with Malassezia furfur fungi infection & causes dandruff. Treatment of scalp folliculitis : [Any of anti-staphylococcal antibiotics may used.] ► Cap. Doxycycline 100 mg / Doxicap (ren) / Doxin (ops) / Doxacil (sq) 100 mg, ১ + ০ + ১ --------- ১৪ – ৩০ দিন ± ► Cream Fusidic acid 2% Cream + Hydrocortisone 1% / Fusitop-HC (sq)/ Facid HC (skf)/ Fusibac-H (drg) / Fusicort (ops) Cream, দিনে দুই থেকে তিনবার আক্রান্ত স্থানে লাগাবেন ------ ১৪ – ৩০ দিন ► Shampoo Ketoconazole 2% / Nizoder (uni) / Dancel (incp) / Ketozol (aris) / Select plus (sq) / Odessy (ethi), গোসলের সময় আক্রান্ত স্থানে লাগিয়ে ১০ মিনিট অপেক্ষা করুন ---- ১ মাস ► Tab. Levo-cetrizine 5 mg / Alcet (hc) / Seasonix (incp) / Sinacet (ibn), ০ + ০ + ১ ------- ৫ – ৩০ দিন

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Erythrasma is a superficial skin infection by Corynebacterium (super added with fungus) that causes brown, scaly skin patches. Predisposing factors : warm, humid climate. Lesion features : Usually asymptomatic or itchy, well defined, irregular, scaly, uniformly pink but more frequently brown macules. Common sites : Interdigital spaces (between toes), axilla, groins and sub-mammary area. Treatment : Topical antifungal : ► Cream Miconazole 2% / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops) / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Fungimin (kum), দিনে ২ – ৪ বার লাগাবেন ............. ১ থেকে ২ মাস (আক্রান্তস্থান স্বাভাবিক হওয়ার পরেও অন্তত এক সপ্তাহ পর্যন্ত ক্রিম বা মলম লাগাতে থাকতে হবে।) + Topical antibiotics : (Erythromycin, Sodium fusidate or benzyl peroxide for 2 – 4 weeks) ► Cream Sodium Fusidate 2% / Facid (sq) / Fusidate (aris) / Fucidin Leo (leo), দিনে ২ – ৩ বার লাগাবেন ........... ১ থেকে ২ মাস (আক্রান্তস্থান স্বাভাবিক হওয়ার পরেও অন্তত এক সপ্তাহ পর্যন্ত ক্রিম বা মলম লাগাতে থাকতে হবে।) ± ± In relapsing lesions : Oral Clarithromycin. ► Tab. Clarithromycin 500 mg / Remac (sq) / Klabid (uni) / Clarin (drg) / Binoclar (nova) / Klarix (incp), ১ + ০ + ১ …..... ৭ – ১৪ দিন

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Pitted keratolysis (also known as keratolysis sulcata, keratolysis plantare sulcatum, and ringed keratolysis) is a superficial bacterial skin infection confined to the stratum corneum. Pitted keratolysis is caused by a range of bacterial species, which thrive under moist and warm conditions. Commonly caused by Kytococcus sedentarius (Micrococcus), Corynebacterium, Dermatophilus, Streptomyces and Actinomyces. Features of lesion : Fine, punched out, often discrete and elongated pits which become confluent to give a cribriform pattern. Sites of predilection : Soles (Usually bilaterally symmetrical, on pressure points and interdigital spaces). Associated with feet wet, soggy and malodorous. Patient often have keratoderma and hyperhydrosis. Young males are more susceptible.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Topical antibiotic : ► Clindamycin 1 % Lotion / Clindacin (incp) / Clindax (ops) / Lindamax (skf) Lotion, 2 – 3 times daily & kept at-least 3 hours for 1 – 2 months. Or, ► Benzoyl Peroxide 4 % or 5% / Topical gel Oxigel (uni) / Cream Benzac (drg), Apply 1 – 2 times daily for 4 – 6 weeks. + Anti-perspirant / Anti-sweating agent : ► Solution Aluminum chloride hexahydrate 20% / Solution Dricare (zis) / Sudor-X (uni) / Apirent (ops), After cleaning affected area, apply at night & wash off in morning for 3 – 7 days then, use (maintenance therapy) once or twice weekly as per desired effect. ± Oral antibiotic in extensive cases : ► Tab. Erythromycin 500 mg / Eromycin DS (sq) / Erosa (bio) / A-Mycin (aris) / Mycin (amb) 500 mg, 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 –––– 1 month. ± Anti-histamine (if itching) : ► Tab. Cetrizine 10 mg / Acitrin (aci) / Alatrol (sq) / Atrizin (bex) / Citin (ops) / CTZ (del) / Riz (ori), 0 + 0 + 1 –––– 5 – 10 days Advise : ° Keep the area dry. ° Avoid occlusive foot ware.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: It is nail inflammation of nail fold that may result from trauma, irritation or infection (usually both bacterial & fungal). Chronic paronychia is caused by a mixture of yeasts (candida, herpes simplex and bacteria Staphylococcus aureus. Recurrence is most common in people who often have their hands in water, detergents or chemicals, have poor circulation (cold hands and feet) or diabetes. Women get chronic paronychia more often than men. Clinical features : Painful, tender, red swelling of the nail fold Treatment of paronychia, ► Cap. Flucloxacillin 250 or, 500 mg / Flux (ops) / A-Flox (acm) / Flubex (bex) / Fluclox (aci) / Phylopen DS (sq) / Flustar (ren), ১ + ১ + ১ + ১ ------- ৭ – ১৪ দিন ► Topical Solution Clotrimazole 1% / Solution Dermasim (aci) / Clarizol (incp) / Trimazole (ops) Or, Cream Clotrimazole 1% / Afun (sq) / Neosten (bex) / Clotrim (acm) / Dermasim (aci) Cream, দিনে দুই থেকে তিনবার লাগাবেন, (লোশনটি হালকা ঘষে বা চেপে আঙুলের নখের ফাঁকে ঢুকাবেন) -------- ১ – ২ মাস ± ► Ointment Retapamulin 1% / Retabac (sq) / Retapex (incp) / Topibac (pop) / Pamulin (nav), দিনে দুই বার লাগাবেন, (অয়েন্টমেন্টটি হালকা ঘষে বা চেপে আঙুলের নখের ফাঁকে ঢুকাবেন) --------- ১ মাস Incase of chronic paronychia, topical antifungal may extend for next 2 – 3 months or may add oral antifungal - ± ► Tab. Itraconazole 100 or 200 mg / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav) / Itrader (uni) / Itrazen (bacn) 200 mg, ০ + ০ + ১ (খাবার পর) ------ ১ মাস

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: SHINGLE / HERPES ZOSTER Features of lesion : ¤ Severe burning pain. ¤ Usually unilateral, segmental distribution. Thoracic dermatomes and the ophthalmic division of the trigeminal nerve commonly involved. ¤ Confined to a single dermatome, rarely cross midline. ¤ Vesicles appear 3-4 days later. Presence of group vesicles on erythematous oedematous skin, rapidly evolve into pustules then crust. ¤ More additional symptoms : fever, chills, headache, fatigue, muscle weakness. Intensely itchy and painful, group of fluid-filled blisters that break easily, burning sensation along the affected dermatome. Herpes zoster can occur in any single dermatome of body, When it involved eyes, then it is called Herpes zoster ophthalmicus, and when involved ear, then it is called herpes zoster oticus. This two condition is very danger. Because have chance of blindness and hearing loss if remain untreated. So, these case should be referred to EYE / ENT specialists. Refer to dermatologist is wide spread / disseminated shingles or unrelieved pain / discomfort. Sign symptoms of Herpes Zoster Ophthalmicus (HZO) – ¤ Severe throbbing type headache. ¤ Pain around the eye & intensely itchy sensation. ¤ Conjunctivitis. ¤ Fever, fatigue, weakness etc. Risk Group : Shingles / Herpes Zoster can occur in anyone who has had chicken pox in his/her lifetime (childhood). Commonly affects old aged & weaken your immune system, such as HIV or cancer having had chemotherapy or radiation, organ transplant, long time steroid etc.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Treatment : Anti-viral drug (Local & Oral) : Should be started within 72 hours after onset of the zoster rash. ● Cream Acyclovir 5% / Virux (sq) / Clovir (ibn) / Novirax (drg), Applied on lesions 4 – 5 times per day for 4 – 5 days. ● Tab. Valacyclovir 1 g or, 500 mg / Revira (sq) / Valovir (incp) / Zostiva (uni), [3000 mg/day for 7 – 10 days], 1 + 1 + 1 (1000 mg) or, 2 + 2 + 2 (500 mg) ––––––––––– 7 days [Or, ● Tab. Acyclovir 400 mg / Virus (sq) / Novirax (drg) / Xovir (bacn) / Viroxi (skf) 400 mg, (800 mg 4 to 5 times daily for 5 days, Valacyclovir is superior than acyclovir) 2+2+2+2+2 –––– 5 – 10 days] + Anti histamine : For itching. ● Tab. Hydroxyzine 10 or 25 mg / Xyril (ops) / Artica (aci) / Roxyzen (incp) 25 mg, 0 + 0 + 1 –––––––– 15 – 21 days + Analgesics : For pain & burning sensation. ● Tab. Paracetamol 325 mg + Tramadol 37.5 mg / NapaDol (bex) / Acetram (sq) / Utracet (uni) / Resadol (incp) / Pangesic (ren), 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 –––––––– 5 days ↓ Or, ± ● Cream Capsaicin 0.025% / Topicacin (incp) / Ostocin (gen), Apply thin film 3 to 4 times a day for 2 weeks. ↓ Or, In case of acute severe non responsive pain : ● Tab. Prednisolone 10 mg / Cortan (incp) / Deltasone (ren) 20 mg, 1 + 1 + 0 or, 0 + 1 + 0 (A/M) –––––––– 7 days

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Features : 1. Pain in eyelid and surroundings. 2. Skin lesions : Chronological appearance of – • Macule : Red spot • Papule : Small nodular shape • Vesicle : Fluid appears in the papules • Pustules : Fluid becomes pus • Crusts : Pustules ruptures forming crusts • Ulceration : On removal of the crusts, ulceration appears. Rx ⊕ Tab. Valacyclovir 1gm / Revira (sq) / Valovir (incp) 1 g, 1 + 0 + 1 ------- 7 days ⊕ Cap. Flucloxacillin 500 mg / Flustar (ren) / Flubac (pop) / Phylopen DS (sq) / A-Flox (acm) / Flustaph (ori) 500 mg, 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 -------- 7 days ⊕ Cap. Pregabalin 25 mg / Gabarol (aci) / Lyric (hc) / Nervalin (bex) / Neugalin (acm) / PG (skf), 0 + 0 + 1 ------- 3 days, then 1 + 0 + 1 ------- 4 days, then 1 + 1 + 1 -------- 7 days ⊕ Tobramycin 0.3% eye drop / E/D Cinarex (bex) / Intobac (incp) / T-Mycin (aris), 1 drop in affected eye 6 hourly ------- 10 days ⊕ Acyclovir 5% topical / Cream Virux (sq) / Novirax (drg) / Cream Acerux (ops) / Simplovir (incp), Apply in affected area 5 times daily, ------ Till resolution of wound (never apply into eye) If cornea is involved : ⊕ Acyclovir 3% eye ointment / Cuvir (gen) / E/Oint Clovir (ibn) / Acerux (ops), Apply in affected eye 5 times daily ------ 15 days

treatment.title: Discussion
treatment.description: Disseminated herpes zoster : also called disseminated zoster or disseminated shingles, is usually defined as a generalized eruption of more than 10-12 extra dermatomal herpes zoster vesicles occurring 7-14 days after the onset of classic dermatomal herpes zoster. For Post-herpetic neuralgia (PHN) : The main symptom of post-herpetic neuralgia is intermittent or continuous nerve pain in an area of your skin previously affected by shingles. The pain may come and go or be continuous. It can be described as burning, stabbing, shooting, aching, throbbing or like electric shocks. ● Tab. Pregabalin 82.5 or, 165 mg / Gabarol CR (aci) / PG CR (skf) / Gaba-P CR (ren) / Pregaben CR (incp) / Neurolin CR (sq) / Nervalin CR (bex) 82.5 mg 0 + 0 + 1 ––––– 3 Months [Pregabalin (commencing at 75 mg twice daily and building up to 100 mg or 200 mg 3 times daily if tolerated).] Or, ● Tab. Gabapentin 300 mg / Gaba (ren) / Gabastar (sq) / Gabapen (incp) / Gabastar (sq) / Neuropen (drg) / Gabatin (uni), 1+0+0 (1st day), then, 1+0+1 (2nd day), then – 1+1+1 ––––– 3 Months (May need up to 2+2+2/day) [Gabapentin (commencing at 300 mg daily and building slowly to 300 mg twice daily or more)] Or, [Amitriptyline 25-100 mg daily] TCA : ● Tab. Amitriptyline 25 mg / Amilin (ops) / Amit (gen) / Tryptin (sq) / Amitip (paci) / Tripsina (ibn) 25 mg , 0 + 0 + 1 ––––– 3 Months. Or, SNRI : ● Tab. Duloxetine 20 or, 30 mg / Duolox (acm) / Loxetine (aci) / Duzela (sun) / Duloxen (incp) 20 or, 30 mg / Cap. (20 or, 60 mg) Stresin (uni) / Diliner DR (sq), 0 + 0 + 1 ––––––––––– 3 Months [May increase dose up to 60 mg/day (once daily)]

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Most common in preschool children. It is a viral infection that produces clusters of raised bumps, or lesions, on the upper layers of skin. The small bumps are usually painless. They resolve without treatment and rarely leave scars. The bumps are self-limiting, e.g., untreated lesions resolve spontaneously after 6 months to 2 years. Usually lesions are discrete (multiple and grouped) pearly pink or brown umbilicated papules, e.g., small (1-6mm), firm, raised papules (spots) on the skin with a characteristic small dimple in the middle (umbilicated/central pit). No pus but if squeezed papules release a cheesy material. Each papule contains white cheesy material. The spots are not painful, non-itchy, sometimes mildly itchy. The lesions are small clusters and can be spread across different parts of the body. Often found in trunk, face, or neck. Treatment : ● Cream Tretinoin 0.025% / Cosmotrin (bex) / Ratin-A (syn), A pply at lesion with cotton bud at night (OD) ----- 4-8 weeks Or, ● Topical salicylic acid 6% / Cream Kerasol (incp) / Salicid 12%, Apply locally BD ------ 8 weeks ● If itchiness : anti-histamine.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Features : usually asymptomatic, multiple, erythematous superficial erosions, present circumferentially on perineum. Specially on vestibule in case of female or prepuce and glans, difficult to retract the prepuce in case of male. Bilateral lymphadenopathy and constitutional symptoms. Treatment : ► Tab. Valacyclovir 500 mg / Revira (sq) / Valovir (incp) / Zostiva (uni), 1+0+1 – 10 days [May increase up to 3000 mg/day for 7-10 days]

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.disease_name: Oro-labial herpes / Fever blister / Cold Sore
treatment.description: Caused by herpes simplex virus (HSV). Lesions are tiny, fluid- filled blisters on and around lips. These blisters are often grouped together in patches. Tingling and itching around the lips, blister, oozing and crusting. After the blisters break, a scab forms that can last several days. Cold sores usually heal in two to three weeks without leaving a scar, so no treatment recommended, only counselling & observation. Recurrent eruptions can occur, precipitated by overexposure to sunlight, febrile illnesses, physical or emotional stress, or immunosuppression. Treatment, ● Oral Gel Cetalkonium+Choline Salicylate / Bongel Oral Gel (gen), Apply layer of gel over lesion 6 – 8 times daily for 5 – 7 days. ± ● Cream Acyclovir 5% / Virux (sq) / Novirax (drg) / Clovir (ibn), Apply 5 times per day for 4 – 5 days.

treatment.title: Gingivostomatitis
treatment.disease_name: Oro-labial herpes / Fever blister / Cold Sore
treatment.description: ¤ Gingivostomatitis is a combination of gingivitis and stomatitis, or an inflammation of the oral mucosa and gingiva. Herpetic gingivostomatitis is a medical emergency. Primary herpetic gingivostomatitis is common in children from 6 months to 5 years old. Better to refer to specialist (pediatrics/dermatology/dentistry) or, hospitalization in severe cases.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.disease_name: Stretch marks / Striae distensae / Striae gravidarum (SG)
treatment.description: Striae gravidarum (SG) are atrophic linear scars that represent one of the most common connective tissue changes during pregnancy. Prevention of pregnancy stretch marks (striae) : ☼ Apply coconut / olive oil + Glycerine mixture. Or, Bio oil (costly but effecacy varies) Scar / Stretch marks : ☼ Fluocinolone 0.01% + Hydroquinone 4% + Tretinoin 0.05% / Melasin Cream / Mom care cream, Apply once daily at night for 1 - 6 months Or, ☼ Mederma Advanced Scar Gel , applied once a day for 8 weeks for new scars and 3 to 6 months for old scars. Or, ☼ Sesame oil + Cactus extract + Beeswax / Mebo S Ointment . Apply a thin layer of the ointment and gently massage the skin mark area for 5-10 minutes. Repeat 3 to 4 times daily. Continue using until the skin mark become soft and smooth. The duration of usages varies depending on the type of the skin, age and location of the skin mark. Or, ☼ Cicatrix Cream (costly), Apply once daily at night for 1 - 6 months.

treatment.title: Gacozema
treatment.disease_name: Stretch marks / Striae distensae / Striae gravidarum (SG)
treatment.description: Popularly used topical (not a standard combination) : Oint. Gacozema (gaco) / Millat malam (millat) is an acidic substance (causes burn) : Ointment Dithranol 0.1% + Boric Acid 1% + Salicylic Acid 2%. Burns s kin.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Bad odor (armpit or soles) ☼ Clindamycin 1% / Clindax / Clindacin Lotion, Apply in affected area twice daily a nd should not be washed within 3 hours.

treatment.title: Classification & Features
treatment.description: DERMATOPHYTE / RING WORM / TINEA INFECTION Ring like lesion, annular with central clearing. Caused by different types of dermatophytes that infects the skin and appendages. Superficial dermatophytosis according to the site of involvement : 1. Tinea unguium (Onychomycosis)-in nails. Most common in GP. 2. Tinea capitis-in scalp and hair. Common in children (kerion type) 3. Tinea cruris- in skin folds/groin (Jock Itch). Common in DM & obesity. 4. Tinea corporis-in trunk and limbs (body). 5. Tinea faciei-in the face. Misdiagnosed as eczema/psoriasis. 6. Tinea barbae-in beard hair. Confused with folliculitis. 7. Tinea pedis-in foot (athlete's foot). Misdiagnosed as psoriasis. 8. Tinea manuum-in hand. Misdiagnosed as hand eczema. Features of tineasis : ¤ Sharp / well demarcated edge. ¤ Clear center. ¤ Sweaty area / recurs in hot humid climate. ¤ Pleasant itching [But no or least itching in face & rather painful if in scalp. Itching in eczema irritating.] ¤ Pleasant hot water bath. ¤ Asymmetrical distribution. (Psoriasis is symmetrical) ¤ In tinea lesions are not raised, only edge / margin is raised, but in eczema & psoriasis few lesions must be raised & scaly. ¤ Any itchy well demarcated lesion on the skin fold (sweaty area) is tineasis until otherwise proven as other skin condition. Investigating tool for fungus : Diagnosis is mainly clinical. • Wood's light - Ultraviolet light of 365 nm to detect fungal fluorescence. • M/E (microscopic examination) in KOH media. • Culture in sabouraud dextrose agar media (SDA), mycosol agar and dermatophyte test medium. • It takes 1-2 weeks for a positive report for dermatophyte and 4 days for candida. • Sensitivity test of fungus.

treatment.title: Counselling about taeniasis
treatment.description: Counseling of all patients with dermatophytes : ১। ছত্রাক জনিত চর্মরোগ ছোঁয়াচে, তাই পরিবারের অন্যান্য সদস্যদের এ রোগ থেকে থাকলে অবশ্যই চিকিৎসা করতে হবে এবং রোগীর ব্যবহার্য জিনিস অনায সদস্যরা ব্যবহার থেকে বিরত থাকবেন। ২। ক্রিম জাতীয় ওষুধ লাগানোর সময় অবশ্যই আক্রান্ত স্থানের বাহিরেও প্রায় আধা থেকে এক ইঞ্চি জায়গা জুড়ে অর্থা ৎ ভালো চামড়াতেও ওষুধটি লাগাতে হবে। ৩। মুখে খাওয়া ওষুধ প্রেসক্রিপশনে যেভাবে দেওয়া হয়, নিয়মিত সেটি সেইভাবেই খেতে থাকতে হবে। ক্রিম বা ঔষধ শরীরে কেমন প্রতিক্রিয়া সৃষ্টি করে, তার উপরে চিকিৎসার সময়কাল নির্ধারিত হয়। তাই চিকিৎসার শুরুতেই বলা সম্ভব না যে, ওষুধ/মলমটি কয়দিন খেতে হবে। ৪। ক্রিম লাগানো বা ওষুধ খাওয়ার অল্প কিছুদিনের মধ্যেই অনেকটা উন্নতি লক্ষ্য করা যায়। তারপরও মলম/ওষুধ আরো নূন্যতম দুই সপ্তাহ পর্যন্ত লাগিয়ে যেতে হবে বা ঔষধ খেতে হবে। নাহলে এই রোগ পুনরায় ফেরত আসতে পারে। ক্রিম/ওষুধ বাদ দিলে পরবর্তীতে এই রোগ সারানোর জন্য চিকিৎসা পদ্ধতি কঠিন ও ব্যয়বহুল হয়ে পড়ে। সাধারণত নূন্যতম দেড় মাস বা তার অধিক পর্যন্ত ওষুধ খেতে থাকতে হয়। তিন সপ্তাহ বা তার বেশি মলমটি লাগাতে থাকতে হয়। তাই এই চিকিৎসাতে ধৈর্যের প্রয়োজন। ৫। মুখে খাওয়া ওষুধ শুরু করার প্রথম সপ্তাহে অনেক সময় অসুখ বেড়ে যেতে পারে অর্থাৎ আক্রান্ত স্থান বা তার সংখ্যা বৃদ্ধি পেতে পারে। সেইক্ষেত্রেও ওষুধ বাদ না দিয়ে, তিন সপ্তাহ খেয়ে যাওয়া উচিত ও ফলোআপে আসা উচিত। কোন অবস্থাতেই চিকিৎসকের পরামর্শ ছাড়া ওষুধ বন্ধ করা উচিত নয়। তবে তীব্র কোন সমস্যা হলে অতিসত্বর চিকিৎসককে জানাতে হবে। ৬। বিবিধ রকম স্টেরয়েড জাতীয় মলম ব্যবহারের ফলে ছত্রাকজনিত চর্মরোগ অনেকটা কালচে এবং তীব্র হয়ে যায়। এই ধরনে চিকিৎসা দীর্ঘমেয়াদী হয়ে থাকে। মলম/ওষুধ যেভাবে, যে ডোজে দেওয়া হয়, সেভাবেই খাওয়া উচিত। বর্তমানে মুখে খাওয়া ওষুধ সাধারণত প্রতিদিন দেওয়া হয়, দুই-এক ক্ষেত্রে সপ্তাহে একদিন দেওয়া হয় (পালস থেরাপি) । চিকিৎসক ব্যতীত অন্য কারো পরামর্শে ওষুধ ও তার ডোজ পরিবর্তন করা যাবে না। ৭। রেজিস্টার্ড চিকিৎসক ব্যতীত অন্য কারো পরামর্শে দাদ/দাউদের নানান ধরনের মলম ব্যবহার থেকে বিরত থাকবেন। প্রচলিত ক্রিম বা মলম গুলোতে স্টেরয়েড বা অ্যাসিড থাকে, যা অল্প সময়ের জন্য স্বস্তি দিলেও পরবর্তীতে রোগটিকে অনেক জটিল করে তোলে।

treatment.title: Topical antifungal
treatment.description: Anti-fungal Agents / Drugs Topical antifungal - Azole Group : Econazole Topical Antifungal – Allylamines : Terbenafine Shampoo : Ciclopirox Ciclopirox is of lesser potency but least side effects. ● Hyperkeratosis if present needs to be treated with 6 - 12% salicylic acid for better penetration of topical drug Moisturizer needs to applied as there is significant trans-epidermal water loss. ● A combination of topical and systemic therapy may improve cure rates still further or possibly shorten the duration of therapy with the systemic agent. ● Topical terbinafine and butenafine work better than azoles or ciclopirox. Luliconazole is fungicidal and better than terbinafine. ● Early relief of symptoms (2 to 5 days) is experienced by the majority of patients and clinical improvement may be seen fairly soon after treatment is begun with local / topical antifungal. All lesions usually disappear after 2 to 5 weeks. Prolongation of treatment for 10-14 days to prevent relapse is advocated. Note that candida infections, tinea cruris and corporis should be treated for two weeks and tinea pedis for one month in order to reduce the possibility of recurrence. ● Topicals are must preferred than oral anti fungals. ● Always avoid steroid mixed topical preparations for fungal infections. Topical steroids must not be used in any tineasis. But only in jock itch / tinea cruris with eczematous / inflammatory change, steroid + Antifungal combination can be used. In that case hydrocortisone (least potent steroid) is used. Potent & super potent steroids are never to use in any fungal infection. ● Oral antifungals for dermatophytes : • Itraconazole 5mg/kg/day not exceeding 400 mg per day. • Fluconazole 3-6mg/kg/day not exceeding 600 mg per day. • Terbinafin 3-6mg/kg/day not exceeding 500 mg per day. ● Griseofulvin causes headache & vertigo commonly, so it is avoided. Fluconazole shows some extent of resistance & treatment failure, now a days. Better to start with itraconazole at proper dose & duration. ● Safe in pregnancy & child > 6 months : Oral terbinafine only if necessary. During lactation & neonate fluconazole is safe. Most of the topical agents are safe. • Fluconazole and Itraconazole are best absorbed with food. • H2 blockers and PPI interfere with itraconazole absorption. • Itraconazole while given with statins (atorvastatin, simvastatin group) may cause rhabdomyolysis. • Regular and periodic liver function test needs to be done in case of prolonged oral therapy. At least SGPT every 4 weekly. • Combining oral drugs are generally not recommended because of potential risk of hepatotoxicity. ● Voriconazole & Posaconazole are not indicated in superficial fungal infection / dermatophytes. It is used to treat serious fungal or yeast infections, such as aspergillosis (fungal infection in the lungs), candidemia (fungal infection in the blood), esophageal candidiasis (candida esophagitis), or other fungal infections. Newer anti fungals should be kept reserve for severe disease & specialists, a GP should avoid prescribing those drugs. ● Hepatotoxic anti-fungal : ketoconazole and fluconazole, rest are also hepatotoxic to a less extent.

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Tinea Corporis Tinea corporis infection of the glabrous skin, excluding the palms, soles, and groin. Clinical feature : One or more well demarcated, erythematous, slightly scaly macules or plaque like lesions with a slightly elevated border. Lesions expand peripherally with central healing. Severe itching present. Differential diagnosis for tinea corporis can include – Discoid eczema, Psoriasis, Pityriasis rosea herald patch, Seborrhoeic dermatitis. Grading of Tinea : Mild tinea Involves Moderate tinea Involves 3 – 10% BSA Severe tinea Involves > 10% BSA BSA of outstretched palm is 1%.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Scheme of treatment of tineasis / fungal infection : Mild cases : 1 – 3 lesions ( ► Any (one) topical anti-fungal : ☼ Cream Miconazole 2% / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Dakrin (gen) / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops), আক্রান্তস্থানে দিনে তিনবার লাগাবেন --------- ২১ দিন ☼ Cream Terbinafineb 1% / Terbex (bex) / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (drg) / Terbin (ops) / Telfin (uni) / Skinabin (aci) / Terbinox (ibn), দিনে তিন বার আক্রান্তস্থানে লাগাবেন ------- ২১ দিন ► Anti-histamine for pruritus : Tab. Hydroxyzine 10 or 25 mg / Xyril (ops) / Artica (aci) / Roxyzen (incp) 25 mg, 0+0+1 –– 7-10 days ↓ Moderate to severe tinea or, not controlled by topical agents, then Topical + Systemic antifungal should be started : Add – ► Cream Miconazole 2% / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Dakrin (gen) / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops), আক্রান্তস্থানে দিনে তিনবার লাগাবেন ----------- ২১ দিন + ► Tab. Itraconazole 200 mg / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav) / Itrader (uni) / Itrazen (bacn) 200 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ (খাবার পর) -------- ২১ দিন Follow up after 14 – 21 days. If lesions are totally abolished, then omit oral antifungal & continue topical antifungal further 2 weeks. ↓ If still no response or new lesion eruption or patients at first visit, who has H/O irregular treatment / recurrent episodes within 6 months : ► Cream Miconazole 2% / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Dakrin (gen) / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops), আক্রান্তস্থানে দিনে তিনবার লাগাবেন ----------- ২১ দিন + ► Tab. Itraconazole 100 or, 200 mg / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav) / Itrader (uni) / Itrazen (bacn) 200 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ (খাবার পর) ---- ২১ দিন + ► Tab. Terbinafine 250 mg / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (aris) / Terbikill (acm) / Terbex (ops) / Terbinox (ibn), ০ + ১ + ০ --------- ২১ দিন Must continue topical for 7-14 days beyond symptom resolution. Also better to continue oral for 7-14 days (beyond). ● Topical antifungal can be changed in follow up. Econazole ● Add systemic antifungal is required if unresponsive to topical therapy, wide spread lesion or multiple lesions, must alter choice or change the choice in follow up if one agent failed after 2-3 weeks. ☼ Tab. Griseofulvin 500 mg / Griseofulvin FP (bris) / Grisozen (zen) / Afuvin (amb), ০ + ১ + ০ (খাবার পরে) ........... ৪ / ৬ সপ্তাহ Or, ☼ Tab. Ketoconazole 200 mg / Ketoral (sq) / Ketocon (ops), ০ + ১ + ০ (খাবার পরে) .............. ৪ / ৬ সপ্তাহ Or, ☼ Cap. Fluconazole 50 mg / Flugal (sq) / Omastin (bex) / Diflu (aris) / Candinil (hc) / Flunac (drg) 50 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ (খাবার পরে) ...... ৪ / ৬ সপ্তাহ

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: It is a fungal skin infection when the clinical appearance has been altered (usually hyper-pigmented) by inappropriate treatment, usually a topical steroid cream. It is tinea corporis with H/O – ¤ Inadequate duration : Topical antifungal must use up to next 10-14 days even after clearance of lesions (e.g., in normal skin at the previous lesion sites). ¤ Irregular treatment : Irregular intake of drugs or local application at low dose or very short duration. ¤ Inappropriate treatment : Using steroids / topical steroid combinations. Must avoid misdiagnoses of eczema (discoid) or, psoriasis (plaque). ● Change the previous (ineffective / inadequate) drugs : ¤ Topical anti-fungal : Better to step up, as non responsive : Econazole ¤ Oral anti-fungal: Efficacy varies, so change as per response. Fluconazole ↔ Ketoconazole ↔ Itraconazole ↔ Terbinafine.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Model Treatment Protocol : Oral anti-fungal : ► Tab. Itraconazole 200 mg or, 100 (cap) / Itra (sq) / Itrader (uni) / Itrazen (bacn) 200 mg, 0 + 0 + 1 (A/M) -------- 6 – 8 weeks + ► Tab. Terbinafine 250 m g / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (aris) / Terbikill (acm) / Terbex (ops) / Terbinox (ibn), 1 + 0 + 0 --------- 6 – 8 weeks Topical anti-fungal (any one) : ► Cream Clotrimazole 1% / Afun (sq) / Neosten (bex) / Clotrim (acm) / Dermasim (aci), thinly applied & rubbed in, 2 – 3 times daily to the infected sites and surroundings for 6 – 8 weeks Or, ► Cream Naftifine 2% / Nafgal (nav) / T-cure (incp), Apply a thin layer once – twice daily to the affected areas plus a ½ inch margin of healthy surrounding skin for 2 – 6 weeks. Or, ► Cream Luliconazole 1% / Lulitop (sq) / Lulizol (skf) / Lucazol (incp), Apply approximately 1 inch of the immediate surrounding area(s) once – twice daily for 1 – 6 weeks. ± ► Anti fungal shampoo. ± ► Anti histamine.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Clinical feature : Intense itching ± burning sensation in groin, pubic area, peri-anal, perineal skin, sweaty and skin folds / flexural areas. Obese are commonly affected in summer season. Friction in that region is the most contributing aetiology. Treatment, Any one topical anti-fungal agent : ☼ Cream Clotrimazole 1% / ● Afun (sq) / Neosten (bex) / Clotrim (acm) / Dermasim (aci), Thinly applied & rubbed in, 2 – 3 times daily to the infected sites and approx. 1 inch surroundings for 6 – 8 weeks [ It includes extension of further 2 weeks after normalization of the condition.] উপদেশ : আক্রান্তস্থান শুষ্ক ও পরিষ্কার রাখবেন। স্থূলকায় ব্যক্তিরা গোসলের সময় সাদা মিল্ক বা গ্লিসারিন সাবান (ডাভ / মেরিল মিল্ক সোপ / কসকো সাবান) ব্যবহার করতে পারেন। আক্রান্ত স্থান শুষ্ক রাখবেন। ► Solo antifungal without steroid is standard treatment. But may use low potent steroid combination for rapid relief (short term) only in tinea cruris. Tinea on others sites become complicated (non-healing & incognito / blackened area) if steroid is used. ☼ Cream Econazole 1% + Triamcinolone 0.1% / Pevisone (syn) / Econate Plus (incp) / Pevitin (sq) Cream, দিনে ২ – ৩ বার ......... ৫ – ১৪ দিন Or, ☼ Miconazole 2%+Hydrocortisone 1% / Unigal HC (ops) / Fungidal HC (sq) / Micosone (aci) Cream, দিনে ৩ বার ............... ৫ – ১৪ দিন After short term use of low potent steroid, following relief of inflammation/severe discomfort or itching swithch to solo antifungal without steroid.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: It refers to superficial skin-fold infection caused by the yeast, candida. Sweaty and flexural areas (skin folds) are mostly affected. Treatment is topical anti-fungal. Systemic anti-fungal is required if large area involvement or unresponsive to topical cream. Treatment : Topical anti-fungal is used, oral anti-fungal if severe. Nystatin, miconazole and fluconazole are very effective for treating candidiasis. ☼ C ream Miconazole 2% / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Dakrin (gen) / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops), আক্রান্তস্থানে দিনে তিনবার লাগাবেন ------ ২১ – ৪৫ দিন

treatment.title: If ≤2 nail affected
treatment.description: Affects less than 3 nail plate Local Lacquer Affects more than 3 nail plate Oral Antifungal ► If only one or two nails are affected then may use topical – ● Ciclopirox Olamine 8% / Clopirox shampoo/cream (sq) ☼ Candirox Nail Lacquer / Cream (incp) প্রতিদিন রাতে একবার আক্রান্ত নখে লাগাবেন। যতদিন পর্যন্ত নখ পুরোপুরি স্বাভাবিক হয়। এতে সাধারণত হাতের নখের জন্য ৬ মাস ও পায়ের নখের জন্য ১২ মাস পর্যন্ত লাগতে পারে। সপ্তাহে একদিন নেইল পালিশ রিমুভার বা ধাতব কিছু দিয়ে আক্রান্ক নখ থেকে ক্যান্ডিরক্স নেইল ল্যাকার উঠিয়ে ফেলবেন। অথবা, ● Amorolfine 5% / ☼ Clinail Nail Lacquer (incp) / Curafin Cream (nav) প্রতি সপ্তাহে এক-দুইবার আক্রান্ত নখে লাগাবেন। যতদিন পর্যন্ত নখ পুরোপুরি স্বাভাবিক হয়। এতে সাধারণত হাতের নখের জন্য ৬ মাস ও পায়ের নখের জন্য ৯-১২ মাস পর্যন্ত লাগতে পারে। ক্লিনেইল নেইল ল্যাকার ৩ মিনিটের মধ্যে শুকিয়ে যায়, তাই পানি ব্যবহারে কোনো নিষেধ নাই।

treatment.title: Onychomycosis (hand nail)
treatment.description: ● Tab. Terbinafine (Drug of choice) / Terbex (bex) / Terbinox (ibn) / Terbikill (acm) / Telfin (uni) / Dermafin (ori) 250 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ ........... ৬ সপ্তাহ ● Clotrimazole 1% topical solution / ☼ Clarizol (incp) / Dermasim (aci) / Trimazole (ops) solution, ৪ ফোটা আক্রান্ত নখে লাগাবেন দিনে ৩ বার ............ ২ মাস ► Another alternative oral / systemic antifungal instead of Terbinafine – ● Cap. Fluconazole / ☼ Flucon (ops) 150 mg, সপ্তাহে একটি – তিনটি ক্যাপসুল খাবেন (খাবার পরে) ......... ৩ – ৬ মাস

treatment.title: Onychomycosis (toe nail)
treatment.description: ● Tab. Terbinafine (Drug of choice) / ☼ Telfin (uni) 250 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ .......... ১২ সপ্তাহ ● Clotrimazole 1% / ☼ Clarizol (incp) / Dermasim (aci) drop, ৪ ফোটা আক্রান্ত নখে লাগাবেন দিনে ৩ বার .......... ৪ মাস ► Another alternative oral / systemic antifungal instead of Terbinafine – ● Cap. Fluconazole / ☼ Nispore 150 mg, সপ্তাহে একটি – তিনটি ক্যাপসুল খাবেন (খাবার পরে) .......... ৬ - ১২ মাস

treatment.title: Onychomycosis in pediatrics
treatment.description: ➢ Terbinafine [e.g. Terbex (bex) / Telfin (uni) only one strength 250 mg available] ● Child ● Child ≥ 4 yr, 250 mg/day for 4-6 weeks. Plus, ➢ Clotrimazole 1% drop [Clarizol (incp) / Dermasim drop (aci)], 4 drops TDS, if hand nail -- 2 months & foot nail -- 4 months. ► For mild-moderate onychomychosis caused by T. rubum; only 5-8% cure rate. ► Nail Plunking may be needed for severely diseased nail. ► If only one or two nails are affected then may use topical antifungal– ● Amorolfine 5% / ☼ Clinail Nail Lacquer. অথবা, ● Ciclopirox Olamine 8% / ☼ Candirox Nail Lacquer.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Commonly misdiagnosed as eczema. Tinea Manuum is usually unilateral, scaly/clear with sharp border, itchy, often associated with EIB / white macerated areas. Differentiating factors : Hand eczema : Bilateral, less itchy than tinea, scaly, tiny blisters/fissuring. Psoriasis (Hand) : Bilateral, other sites also involved, plaque (thick), non-itchy. Dermatophytosis of palmer skin. Types : 1. Non inflammation-Squamous from : Hyperkeratosis of the palms and finger. Hyperhidrosis is a common association. Associated with nail involvement. 2. Inflammatory vesicular / dyshydrotic / eczematious form Vesicles in cluster form. Lesions are in annular and in cluster form. Treatment : Minor cases : Topical antifungal for 1 – 2 months, 14 days beyond normal keratinization. In severe cases follow the steps in “Tinea Corporis”.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Tinea Pedis / Athlete's foot Types of tenia pedis : Type Lesions Chronic Intertrigenous Fissuring, scaling or maceration of the interdigital or sub-digital areas Chronic papulosquamous Inflammation and or patchy or diffuse moccasin like scaling over the soles Vesicular or vesiculobullous Vesicles and vesiculopustules near insteps and on mid-anterior planter surface. Acute ulcerative Maceration, weaping, denudation and ulceration of sizeable areas on the soles. Pungent odor is characteristics. Clinical feature : - Itching and burning between toes. - Skin becomes flakey, loose, and breaks. Difference between psoriasis (feet) : Bilateral, keratoderma (thick sole), thick plaque/scale, non itchy. Treatment : Any one topical anti-fungal : ● Benzoic Acid 6% + Salicylic Acid 3% (better efficacy) / ☼ Oint. Whitfield (unique/millat)/ Dermin (jay)/ Bensal (gaco), দিনে ২ – ৩ বার ........... ২১ – ৩০ দিন অথবা, ● Cream Miconazole 2% / Miconex (aci) / Dakrin (gen) / ☼ Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops) / Fungidal (sq) cream, দিনে ৩ বার ........... ১৫ দিন অথবা, ● Cream Terbinafine 1% / Telfin (uni) / Elvina (hc) / ☼ Terbex (bex) / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (drg) / Skinabin (aci), দিনে ৩ বার .......... ১৫ - ৩০ দিন উপদেশ : টাইট মোজা ও জুতা পড়বেন না। আঙ্গুলের ফাঁকগুলো শুষ্ক রাখবেন, ঘামতে দিবেন না। গোসল বা পা ধোয়ার পর পরই মুছে শুকিয়ে নিবেন।

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Clinical feature : 1. Usually seen in finger webs as white macerated areas, commonly third web space of foot. 2. The white macerated epidermis has a sweet odor & can easily be rubbed out. 3. When the macerated area peels off, leaves a painful, raw denuded area surrounded. Treatment : Any one topical anti-fungal : ● Benzoic Acid 6% + Salicylic Acid 3% (better efficacy) / ☼ Oint. Whitfield (unique/millat)/ Dermin (jay)/ Bensal (gaco), দিনে ২ – ৩ বার ........... ২১ – ৩০ দিন অথবা, ● Cream Miconazole 2% / Miconex (aci) / Dakrin (gen) / ☼ Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops) / Fungidal (sq) cream, দিনে ৩ বার ........... ১৫ দিন অথবা, ● Cream Terbinafine 1% / Telfin (uni) / Elvina (hc) / ☼ Terbex (bex) / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (drg) / Skinabin (aci), দিনে ৩ বার .......... ১৫ - ৩০ দিন উপদেশ : টাইট মোজা ও জুতা পড়বেন না। আঙ্গুলের ফাঁকগুলো শুষ্ক রাখবেন, ঘামতে দিবেন না। গোসল বা পা ধোয়ার পর পরই মুছে শুকিয়ে নিবেন।

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Features : ¤ Well demarcated edge. ¤ Usually single (round) lesion. ¤ No or little itching. ¤ May fell uneasy sensation on sun exposure. Treatment : Minor cases : Topical antifungal for 1 – 2 months, 14 days beyond normal keratinization. In severe cases follow the steps in “Tinea Corporis”. ► Tinea faciei is uncommon and often misdiagnosed at first. Eczema on face is not a common condition that makes the skin itchy, dry and flaky. Mostly pediatric patients are affected with atopic dermatitis, usually affects cheeks and forehead. Again it is extremely rare to have psoriasis occurring solely on the face. So no steroid should apply on face if diagnosis is uncertain.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Barber's itch (Folliculitis) Tinea Barbae Barber's itch is a staph infection of the hair follicles in the beard area, usually the upper lip. Shaving makes it worse. Tinea barbae usually causes superficial, circular patches & the infection is caused by a fungus. Tinea barbae is similar to barber's itch, but most skin infections in the beard area are caused by bacteria, not fungi. Treatment, ● Topical anti-fungal with antibiotic activity : Benzoic Acid 6% + Salicylic Acid 3% / ☼ Oint. Whitfield (unique/millat) / Dermin (jay) / Bensal (gaco), দিনে ৩ বার ................. ২১ – ৩০ দিন উপদেশ : দাড়ি কাটার সময় উল্টা টান দেওয়া থেকে বিরত থাকবেন।

treatment.title: Discussion
treatment.description: Tinea capitis / scalp ringworm is a fungal infection of the scalp, involving both the skin and hair. Most common in preschool & school children (3-7 years) & contagious. Symptoms : hair loss, dry scaly areas, redness, and itch. May be tender & painful. Tinea barbae is essentially the same condition involving the beard area. D/D : Seborrheic dermatitis (dandruff all over scalp / naso-labial fold), Alopecia areata, Scalp psoriasis, Folliculitis. Clinical types : Non-inflammatory type : A. “White tinea” Tinea capitis : localized patch, multiple scaly lesions (“gray-patch”), stubs of broken hair. B. “Black dot tinea” Tinea capitis : Non inflammatory & multiple area of alopecia. Inflammatory type : C. Kerion type : Manifests as raised, tender, indurated, edematous swelling studded with foliculo-pustules which rupture with release of exudates. Hairs may be shed, resulting in temporary baldness. D. Favus : Characterized by yellowish, cup shaped crusts, scutula which is composed of skin debris and hyphae cicatrical hair loss is eventual. Treatment Options : 1. Oral systemic antifungal Second line therapy : Fluconazole. First line therapy : a) Terbinafine 3-6 mg/kg/day b) Griseofluvin 20-25 mg/kg/day c) Itraconazole 3-5 mg/kg 2. Topical antifungal cream like miconazole, clotrimazole, econazole, terbinafine should be used. 3. Topical preparations such as shampoos, lotions or solutions of selenium sulphide, zinc pyrithione, povidone iodine, ketoconazole may be used as adjunctive therapy. 4. In case of secondary infection – azithromycin, erythromycin, cephalosporin should be used.

treatment.title: Kerion
treatment.description: Tinea capitis is common in children. Most of the cases (two-third) of tinea capitis are kerion type. Lesions heal with scarring and permanent alopecia. Maltreatment & prolongation of tinea capitis is a life time disfigurement (post tenia alopecia) of that child. Lesions of kerion : ● Scaly, erythematous, papular eruptions. ● Loose and broken-off hairs. ● Painful, tender, boggy plaque with exuding pus. Usually kerion is associated with regional lymphadenopathy, fever and malaise. [We know anything pus forming acute ulcerative lesion is bacterial infection, but kerion is bacterial look alike lesion of fungal cause.] Treatment : ➢ Vigorous shampooing with Ketoconazole shampoo – daily for 2 weeks then 3 times/week. ● Shampoo Ketoconazole 2% / ☼ Shampoo Nizoder (uni) / Dancel (incp) / Select plus (sq) / Odessy (ethi) / Resolve (bex) গোসলের সময় পুরো শরীরে লাগিয়ে বা ফেনা করে ৫ – ১০ মিনিট অপেক্ষা করুন। প্রতিদিন ১৪ দিন, তারপরে সপ্তাহে তিনদিন ------------- ১ – ২ মাস + ➢ Oral antifungal : ● Sus. Fluconazole 50 mg/5 ml / Flugal (sq) / Omastin (bex) / Sus. / Syp. Candinil (hc) / Fluconal (acm) / Lucan-R (ren) / Flunac (drg) / Nispore (incp) / Canazole (aci) / Diflu (aris), [ wt/ 10] চামচ দিনে একবার ------- ২ মাস Or, ● Sus / Syp. Itraconazole 50 mg/5 ml / Sus. Sporagin (ibn) / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav), [ wt/ 10] চামচ দিনে একবার -------- ২ মাস + ➢ Topical antifungal therapy – ● Cream Miconazole 2% / Fungidal (sq) / Miconex (aci) / Micoderm (drg) / Dakrin (gen) / Topicazole (incp) / Unigal (ops), আক্রান্তস্থানে দিনে তিনবার লাগাবেন ---------- ৩০ দিন ± ➢ Anti-histamine if itching present. ➢ Options of oral antifungal for adults : ● For adults & Child ≥ 4 years, Tab. Terbinafine 250 mg / Terbex (bex) / Telfin (uni) / Xfin (sq) / Terbinox (ibn)/ Mycofree (drg)/ Skinabin (aci)/ Elvina (hc) 250 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ ............. ৪ – ৬ সপ্তাহ ● Infant & child for 4-6 weeks. Oral Granules or tablets (½ or ¼) may suggest. Terbinafine 125 mg/sachet [Telfin (uni)/Terbin (ops)] Or, ● Tab. Ketoconazole 200 mg (single strength tablet available) / Ketoral (sq) / Ketocon (ops) / Kezona (skf) [3-5 mg/kg/day for 4-6 weeks], 0 + 1 + 0 ---------- 1 – 2 months ➢ Advice : Maintain personal hygiene. All siblings, children in contact should be screened and treated simultaneously. Combs and towel should be kept separately. Avoid any hair oil to scalp. ➢ Better to avoid antibiotics : Though it is pus forming acute painful condition of scalp, it is of fungal origin, not bacterial. Antibiotics must not be prescribed routinely for kerion. Commensal bacteria compete with dermatophytes of scalp & restrict their growth. Scalp is a highly vascular & less chance of contamination (like foot), so bacterial overgrowth in scalp is less common.

treatment.title: Features
treatment.description: Tinea Versicolor (TV) / Pityriasis Versicolor (PV) (শিউলি / ছুলি / ছৈ / সৌদ) ➢ Caused by the dimorphic yeasts. ➢ Commonly on the neck, upper chest, back and upper arms. ➢ Facial lesions are common in teenagers/adolescents. ➢ Typically, the eruption shows large confluent areas, scattered oval patches and outlying macules ➢ Lesions can be fawn-coloured, paler than surrounding skin, or pink. Pale patches may be more common in darker skin ➢ Characteristic macules are covered with a fine scale. ➢ May be asymptomatic or slightly itchy. ➢ More visible in the summer when surrounding skin tans but affected areas do not. ➢ The rash often has an insidious onset and it may take months, or a sunny holiday, before it becomes noticed by the patient. Ø TV causes itching & irritation in sun exposure. Ø TV has short history (at first visit) than vitiligo. Ø TV is dry & fine scaly.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.description: Treatment : ● Cream Terbinafineb 1% / ☼ Terbex (bex) / Xfin (sq) / Mycofree (drg) / Terbin (ops) / Telfin (uni) / Skinabin (aci) / Terbinox (ibn), দিনে তিন বার আক্রান্তস্থানে লাগাবেন .......... ১ – ৩ মাস ● S hampoo Ketoconazole 2% / ☼ Shampoo Nizoder (uni) / Dancel (incp) / Select plus (sq) / Odessy (ethi) / Resolve (bex), গোসলের সময় পুরো শরীরে লাগিয়ে বা ফেনা করে ৫ – ১০ মিনিট অপেক্ষা করুন (সপ্তাহে দুই থেকে তিন দিন) ........... ১ – ৩ মাস উপদেশ : অন্য কারো কাপড়-চোপড়, গামছা-তোয়ালে ব্যবহার বা শেয়ার করবেন না। কাপড়-চোপড়ের ভিতরের অংশ, যা বুকে বা পিঠে লেগে থাকে, সেদিক ইস্ত্রী (আয়রন) করবেন। এটি ভালো হতে কমপক্ষে ৩ মাস সময় লাগতে পারে। দাগ (স্পট) ভালো হয়ে যাওয়ার পরেও পরবর্তী ন্যূনতম ১৪ দিন পর্যন্ত ওষুধ চালিয়ে যেতে হবে, তা না হলে অসুখটি ফিরে আসতে পারে। তাই ধৈর্য্য ধরে চিকি ৎ সা করাবেন। ➢ In severe disease or topical therapies have failed – along with topical drug – Itraconazole (having broad-spectrum activity) 5mg/kg/day maximum 200 mg/day for 5-7 days. ☼ Tab. Itraconazole 200 mg / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav) / Itrader (uni) / Itrazen (bacn) 200 mg, ০ + ১+ ০ (খাবার পর) ------ ৭ দিন অথবা, ☼ Cap. Itraconazole 100 mg / Itra (sq) / Itracon (nav) 100 mg / Candifast SB (eve) 65 mg, ১ + ০ + ১ (খাবার পর) ----- ৭ দিন

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Tinea capitis is common in children. Most of the cases (two-third) of tinea capitis are kerion type. Lesions heal with scarring and permanent alopecia. Maltreatment & prolongation of tinea capitis is a life time disfigurement (post tenia alopecia) of that child. Candinil (hc) / Fluconal (acm) / Lucan-R (ren) / Flunac (drg) / Nispore (incp) / Canazole (aci) / Diflu (aris), [ wt/ 10] চামচ দিনে একবার ------- ২ মাস Or, ● Sus / Syp. Itraconazole 50 mg/5 ml / Sus. Terbinafine 250 mg / Terbex (bex) / Telfin (uni) / Xfin (sq) / Terbinox (ibn)/ Mycofree (drg)/ Skinabin (aci)/ Elvina (hc) 250 mg, ০ + ১ + ০ ............. ৪ – ৬ সপ্তাহ ● Infant & child for 4-6 weeks. Oral Granules or tablets (½ or ¼) may suggest. Terbinafine 125 mg/sachet [Telfin (uni)/Terbin (ops)] Or, ● Tab. Scalp is a highly vascular & less chance of contamination (like foot), so bacterial overgrowth in scalp is less common.

treatment.title: Features & Treatment
treatment.description: Pityriasis rosea is caused by a viral infection. It is not a fungal infection. Pityriasis rosea is a self-limiting (viral) rash, which resolves in about 6–10 weeks. ¤ Age onset usually 10-35 years. ¤ This is acute onset, short duration history. ¤ Mildly itchy. ¤ It is characterized by a large circular or oval "herald patch". The herald patch is followed some time later, typically two days to two weeks or so, by the development of smaller scaly oval red patches, resembling a “Christmas tree”, distributed mainly on the chest, abdomen and back. Treatment : Local steroid & Anti-histamine.
